query: We're standing up a new EKS cluster for a growing platform team. Should we default to Karpenter, managed node groups, or EKS Auto Mode for the data plane?
Three product teams want to share one EKS cluster. What's the right approach for tenant isolation across namespaces, node pools, and network policies?
Our VPC is running short on IPs and we expect 50+ pods per node. How should we plan subnets and VPC CNI mode for a new EKS cluster?
For a new EKS workload that needs AWS permissions, should we use IRSA or EKS Pod Identity? Any reason to still pick IRSA for new stuff?
We're about to roll out our first production services on EKS. What PDBs, probes, and topology spread settings should we put in place for reliability?
We have a critical production EKS cluster and an upgrade coming up. Should we do in-place or blue-green? How do we decide?
EKS bill is creeping up. What are the highest-leverage cost levers — Graviton, Spot, Karpenter consolidation — and in what order?
Here's our node group setup: 2 m5.large on-demand nodes in one AZ, no PDBs, no ingress controller yet. Is this reasonable for prod?
What version of Kubernetes is my EKS cluster currently running, and which add-ons are installed?
Can you inventory what's in my EKS cluster right now — node groups, Karpenter, ingress, CI/CD tooling — before I plan an upgrade?
I need a snapshot of everything running in the cluster: workloads, namespaces, IAM associations. Discovery only, no recommendations yet.
How do I install the EKS MCP server and wire it up to Claude Code so I can query live clusters?
What's the difference between a Kubernetes Deployment and a StatefulSet, and when would I use each?
We're evaluating AKS vs GKE for a new workload. Which managed Kubernetes service has better node autoscaling out of the box?
Is my EKS cluster ready to move from 1.29 to 1.30? Run the readiness checks and give me a score.
Audit my EKS cluster's operational posture — score each area GREEN/AMBER/RED and produce a maturity report.
Run a cost audit on my EKS cluster — I need dollar figures showing exactly how much each namespace is wasting.
Score my cluster's cost efficiency and produce a report with prioritized savings for our FinOps review.
We want app teams to self-serve deployments to EKS through a developer portal with golden paths — how do we stand up that platform?
Set up Backstage, ArgoCD, and Kargo so our developers get a paved self-service CI/CD path on our EKS platform.
Generate a complete EKS architecture design document with ADRs and Mermaid diagrams for our fintech platform
Score and validate this EKS architecture against Well-Architected best practices, output a formal validation report
Generate a production-ready Terraform project for an EKS cluster with Karpenter and ArgoCD Pattern 2a
Add external-secrets and cert-manager addons to our EKS Terraform project with proper IRSA configuration
Audit our ingress controllers and score the migration off nginx to ALB.
We're self-hosting Llama 3 on EKS — should we run it on g6e GPU nodes or Inferentia2, and should serving be vLLM or Ray Serve?
We're processing PHI on EKS and need a HIPAA-ready security baseline across the whole stack — what's the AWS-recommended hardening?
Our PCI-DSS audit is in 4 months; what's the priority order to harden the cluster — CIS, Pod Security Admission, NetworkPolicy, GuardDuty?
